raw.subject: Your Albany page caught my eye
raw.body:
Hi,

Show off your pup's patriotic style! 🇺🇸 caught my attention - you must be passionate about helping pets look their best. But I noticed you don't have your own website yet, which might make it harder for new clients to find and book your services.

I sketched a page idea that could showcase your grooming services, highlight photos from your Facebook posts, and make it easy for people to book a call. https://sites.damianbasilio.dev/preview/perfectly-pawlished-pet-grooming-llc-albany

I'd love to discuss how a website can help you grow your business in Albany - I offer a flat fee for local businesses. Would you be available for a quick call this week?
